mapper.sql: SELECT w.work_id, w.user_id, u.user_name, u.dept_id, d.dept_name, w.project_id, p.project_name, w.work_date, w.work_hours, w.work_desc FROM work_time_apply w INNER JOIN `user` u ON w.user_id = u.user_id INNER JOIN department d ON u.dept_id = d.dept_id INNER JOIN project p ON w.project_id = p.project_id
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM `user` WHERE user_id = #{managerId} AND user_role = '1'
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM `user` WHERE user_id = #{adminId} AND user_role = '0'
SELECT d.dept_name FROM `user` u INNER JOIN department d ON u.dept_id = d.dept_id WHERE u.user_id = #{managerId}

INNER JOIN `user` manager_user ON manager_user.user_id = #{managerId} WHERE manager_user.user_role = '1' AND manager_user.dept_id = u.dept_id AND w.status = 2 AND w.is_deleted = 0 AND w.work_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} ORDER BY w.work_date ASC, w.work_id ASC
WHERE w.status = 2 AND w.is_deleted = 0 AND w.work_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} ORDER BY d.dept_id ASC, u.user_id ASC, w.work_date ASC, w.work_id ASC
